differentials.name: Effect of impurity:   degradation of image quality
differentials.raw: Effect of impurity:   degradation of image quality

context: ◊  Carrier-free product Radionuclide Impurity =  amount (µCi) of radiocontaminant per amount (µCi/mCi) of desired radionuclide 99Mo Breakthrough Test Test frequency:   with every elution (a)  NRC allowable contamination of 1÷1,000 = 1 µCi 99Mo per 1 mCi of 99mTc (b)  USP limit of 0.15 µCi 99Mo per 1 mCi 99mTc (c)  < 5 µCi 99Mo per administered dose (NRC dropped this requirement, but nonagreement states may still require this) (d)  chemical evaluation: 99Mo contaminated eluate forms colored complexes with phenylhydrazine (for reactor product generators) Effect of impurity:   increased radiation
